title: deer-flow.forge.seal.stamped v1
description: A seal on a Forge session was stamped, skipped, or auto-stamped. Producer: backend/packages/harness/deerflow/bus.py::emit_forge_seal_stamped (and the forge router for slot-change emits). Subject is session_id. The optional `reason` field is truncated to 200 chars and is only present for skipped/auto-stamped seals.

seal_type.description: which seal slot (e.g. code_review, quality_gate, integration_test, human_signoff)

status.description: stamp outcome (e.g. stamped, skipped, auto_stamped, failed)

bead_id.description: beads id this session was opened for

project_name.description: target project the session is running against
